Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

Please think this over!!!!

Philosophy · asked by user [] · 2007-08-20 · 8 answers
WHY IS THERE NO PUBLICATION OF THE ORIGINAL INDIAN/ENGLISH OF A.C BHAKTIVENDANTA SWAMI --only for the devotees?
Prubhupada did say those words himself word 4 word
I would really like that...... and if someone wants to they can read that right??? I think that would be THE BEST EVER!!!!!!
Im thinking words like indian/english from from Victorian educational syllabus of Swami Maharajas time, may sort of heavy out the "Other" Jivias
Imagine that nectar!!!
user [40] · 2007-08-20
You can get the original audio of some books, I have heard some of it, the original recordings of Srila Prabhupada stopping and starting the tape as he speaks each part.
user [24] · 2007-08-20
I have the Krishna Book dictations minus a few chapters. Nectar!
user [40] · 2007-08-20
how fantastic
user [1] · 2007-08-20
[quote][cite] K.C sena:[/cite]WHY IS THERE NO PUBLICATION OF THE ORIGINAL INDIAN/ENGLISH OF A.C BHAKTIVENDANTA SWAMI --only for the devotees?
Prubhupada did say those words himself word 4 word
I would really like that...... and if someone wants to they can read that right??? I think that would be THE BEST EVER!!!!!!
Im thinking words like indian/english from from Victorian educational syllabus of Swami Maharajas time, may sort of heavy out the "Other" Jivias
Imagine that nectar!!![/quote]

Please limit the use of CAPITALS and ??????, !!!!!!!!!!!!.

For those of you that do not know, it is the equivalent of SHOUTING on the internet. Thankyou..
user [33] · 2007-08-20
I also have copies the Krishna Book dictations and the intro of Bhagavad-gita As It Is dictated by Srila Prabhupada (they are on the audio disk collection). Hayagriva dasa had a lot of the original dictations and several years ago I witnessed some of them selling on ebay by the devotee who was his friend and ended up with Hayagrivas items when he left his body.
user [2] · 2007-08-20
[quote][cite] ekendra:[/cite]I have the Krishna Book dictations minus a few chapters. Nectar![/quote]
could you link some in your web so that we can share the nectar?
user [2] · 2007-10-28
I found it:
Krsna Book Original Dictation Tapes
http://www.archive.org/details/Bhaktivedanta-Swami-Prabhupada025
user [24] · 2007-10-28
[quote][cite] mishra:[/cite]I found it:
Krsna Book Original Dictation Tapes
http://www.archive.org/details/Bhaktivedanta-Swami-Prabhupada025[/quote] Great. I was thinking how to put them up for everyone but was concerned about my bandwidth limitations. excellent that they are available. I consider these recordings the best things in existence. I hope everyone downloads them and listens to them for the rest of their lives.
